name: Spicy Texas Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless beef top round steak, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 14.5 oz cans whole tomatoes, undrained, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a nonstick Dutch oven or large skillet with cooking spray.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add beef, onion, chile pepper, and garlic; cook until beef is no longer pink.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 15-20 minutes or until slightly thickened and flavors are blended, stirring occasionally.
7. Season with salt if desired.
